---
name: Hardware Test Report
about: Document results from testing MIXI-CUT on real vinyl/hardware
title: "[HW TEST] "
labels: hardware, testing
assignees: ''
---

## Test Setup

### Turntable
- Model: [e.g., Technics SL-1200 MK2]
- RPM: [33⅓ / 45]
- Condition: [new / used]

### Cartridge / Stylus
- Model: [e.g., Ortofon Concorde DJ S]
- Condition: [new / <100h / >100h]

### Vinyl
- Material: [PVC / polycarbonate / PET]
- Cutting service: [e.g., Vinylify]
- WAV preset used: [e.g., dj-12inch]

### Audio Interface
- Model: [e.g., Focusrite Scarlett 2i2]
- Input mode: [LINE / PHONO]

## Results

### Lock
- Time to lock: [e.g., 1.5s]
- Lock quality (steady state): [e.g., 0.95]

### Speed
- Speed accuracy: [e.g., 1.001x]
- Pitch +8% test: [pass / fail]
- Scratch test: [pass / fail]

### Position
- Position error over 60s: [e.g., ±5ms]

### Durability
- Plays before degradation: [e.g., >100]

## Audio Recording
If possible, attach a WAV recording of the playback for analysis.

## Photos / Video
If possible, attach photos of the setup and/or a video of the test.
